Exhibition Room

Phlox

Dense clusters of phlox in pink and white, painted at the height of bloom alongside asters, alliums, and peonies in the summer border.

No. 14-1
Phlox II
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas

Nona Dronova · 2020 · Oil on canvas

Phlox, Peonies, and Asters
Nona Dronova · 2020 · Oil on canvas
